channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How “The Burbs” Series Gave a 'Little Wink' to Original Star Carrie Fisher and Featured Tom Hanks
item.description: While Hanks made a brief but surprise appearance (sort of), Fisher was also subtly honored in the Peacock series

item.title: Prince William Arrives in Saudi Arabia for Solo Royal Tour After Releasing First Statement on Epstein
item.description: The Prince of Wales is undertaking his first foreign tour of 2026 and will spend three days in the country

item.title: Her Husband Just Became a Super Bowl Champion. Now They Have 60 Days to Finish Planning Their Wedding (Exclusive)
item.description: Emily Carlson and Seattle Seahawks tight end Nick Kallerup are engaged and set to be married in April, following the Seahawks' win in the 2026 Super B...

item.title: Olivia Colman Says She 'Never Felt Massively Feminine': 'Always Described Myself to My Husband as a Gay Man'
item.description: The Oscar winner and her husband Mark Sinclair have been married since 2001, and they share three kids

item.title: Snoop Dogg's Daughter Cori Broadus Honors Her Late Daughter at Memorial Service One Week After the 10-Month-Old's Death
item.description: Broadus announced her daughter Codi's death on Saturday, Jan. 31

item.title: James Pearce Jr. Allegedly Hit Cop With Car While Evading During Rickea Jackson Dispute
item.description: James Pearce Jr. "intentionally" hit an officer with his Lamborghini while evading law enforcement after an alleged domestic dispute with WNBA star Ri...

item.title: Seahawks Fans Flood Seattle Streets After Super Bowl LX Win
item.description: Seattle Seahawks fans waited more than a decade for payback on the Patriots ... and they finally completed their revenge arc with a party for the ages...

item.title: Seattle Seahawks Rage After Super Bowl Win With T-Pain, Ludacris Concert
item.description: The Seattle Seahawks didn't just hoist the Lombardi Trophy -- they capped their Super Bowl victory with a private T-Pain and Ludacris show. TMZ Sports...

item.title: Kendall Jenner Watches Ex Bad Bunny Perform at Super Bowl Halftime Show
item.description: Bad Bunny’s ex Kendall Jenner was front and center at the Super Bowl, cheering on the Puerto Rican superstar during his halftime show like it was all ...

item.title: Ricky Martin, Lady Gaga Show Love to Bad Bunny After Super Bowl Performance
item.description: After their showstopping Super Bowl Halftime Show appearances, Ricky Martin and Lady Gaga kept the lovefest going with Bad Bunny on Sunday ... linking...
